'''rabozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saberbill|saberbill]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saberbill|saberbill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rabozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræbezeth|ræbezeth]] || [[word:ræbezej|ræbezej]] || [[word:ræbezesh|ræbezesh]] || [[word:ræbeze|ræbeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabobozoth|rabobozoth]] || [[word:rabobozoj|rabobozoj]] || [[word:rabobozosh|rabobozosh]] || [[word:rabobozo|rabobozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabozoth|rabozoth]] || [[word:rabozoj|rabozoj]] || [[word:rabozosh|rabozosh]] || [[word:rabozo|rabozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabofzoth|rabofzoth]] || [[word:rabofzoj|rabofzoj]] || [[word:rabofzosh|rabofzosh]] || [[word:rabofzof|rabofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rabozotho|rabozotho]] || [[word:rabozojo|rabozojo]] || [[word:rabozosho|rabozosho]] || [[word:rabozoko|rabozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rabozoth|rabozoth]] || [[word:rabozoj|rabozoj]] || [[word:rabozosh|rabozosh]] || [[word:rabozo|rabozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rabozothol|rabozothol]] || [[word:rabozojol|rabozojol]] || [[word:rabozoshol|rabozoshol]] || [[word:rabozokol|rabozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rabozothotho|rabozothotho]] || [[word:rabozojojo|rabozojojo]] || [[word:rabozoshosho|rabozoshosho]] || [[word:rabozoko|rabozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rabozothon|rabozothon]] || [[word:rabozojon|rabozojon]] || [[word:rabozoshon|rabozoshon]] || [[word:rabozokon|rabozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rabozothoro|rabozothoro]] || [[word:rabozojoro|rabozojoro]] || [[word:rabozoshoro|rabozoshoro]] || [[word:rabozokoro|rabozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
